# Omar Al-Bakri — Applied AI Engineer

Omar Al-Bakri builds production AI products for complex, regulated markets. He combines hands-on Python and TypeScript engineering with fifteen years in enterprise payments, so he can understand the buyer, shape the product and ship the system.

Bangkok-based · open to remote roles, consulting and contracting globally

## Remote roles

Hands-on roles in applied AI, agent platforms, forward-deployed engineering and FinTech AI, particularly where product judgement, client fluency and code ownership need to sit with one person.

## Consulting and contracting

Fixed-scope delivery for teams with a defined AI problem: prototype-to-production builds, retrieval and evaluation hardening, agent-system architecture, or fractional technical leadership.

## Selected systems

### CallScore

A creator-intelligence product connecting public market calls with timestamped price evidence and transparent scoring workflows.

### ruleIQ

A compliance platform connecting frameworks, obligations, controls and evidence through graph and retrieval workflows.

### Helios

An AI-assisted commercial workflow platform with explicit controls around automated actions.

### thredOS

A typed multi-agent workflow runtime with policy-controlled execution and provenance tracking.
